title: Chicken Skivers with Citrus Crumble
description: A quick and easy breakfast recipe featuring crispy chicken skivers topped with a zesty citrus crumble.
instructions: 1. Cut the chicken breast into thin strips.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
3. Dip each chicken strip into the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
4. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the chicken strips to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
6. While the chicken is cooking, mix together orange and lemon juice, and zest in a small bowl.
7. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
8. In the same skillet, add the beaten eggs and scramble until cooked through.
9. Add the citrus mixture to the scrambled eggs and stir to combine.
10. Serve the chicken skivers with the citrus crumble on top.
